package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_map_string_bool_for_membership: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]bool membership sets where map[string]struct{} avoids unnecessary value storage.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule521PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario521Positive(records []Rule521PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
